scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @lets-talk/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @lets-talk/conversation build && pnpm --filter @lets-talk/memory build && pnpm --filter @lets-talk/ast-tools build && pnpm --filter @lets-talk/context build && pnpm --filter @lets-talk/agent-runtime build && next dev --port ${PORT:-3000}
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @lets-talk/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @lets-talk/conversation build && pnpm --filter @lets-talk/memory build && pnpm --filter @lets-talk/ast-tools build && pnpm --filter @lets-talk/context build && pnpm --filter @lets-talk/agent-runtime build && next build
